title: Safety Source Update for June 19, 2026
summary: Most public safety-data sources available in the app showed no major platform or access change this week. The main user-facing item is a planned AEMPS maintenance window in Spain, with a broader maintenance notice also posted on its medical-device alerts page. TGA also added a public notice about a known historical data gap in one DAEN field. FDA announced a June 29, 2026 reporting-system update behind MAUDE, but no public FDA device-feed outage was announced.
updates: AEMPS posted a notice saying its corporate website stopped receiving new content updates from June 9, 2026 during maintenance, and it separately announced that all AEMPS applications will be unavailable on July 18, 2026 from 14:00 to 23:00 local time. The AEMPS medical-device alerts feed used by the app was still returning fresh records on June 19, 2026, but users should expect possible interruption around the July 18 maintenance window. [AEMPS alerts page](https://www.aemps.gob.es/comunicacion/alertas/productos-sanitarios-2/)

TGA added a public note on June 3, 2026 that the DAEN `reported event outcome` field may be blank for reports published before October 2019. This is a historical data-quality notice rather than a full outage, but older records may have missing outcome values. [TGA DAEN page](https://www.tga.gov.au/safety/adverse-events/database-adverse-event-notifications-daen)

FDA announced a June 29, 2026 eMDR production update behind medical-device adverse-event reporting. FDA did not announce a public outage for the device databases used in the app, but short reporting delays are possible around the rollout. [FDA eMDR enhancements](https://www.fda.gov/medical-devices/emdr-electronic-medical-device-reporting/emdr-system-enhancements)
no_major_changes: FDA Recall, FDA CDRH Recalls, FDA Safety Communications, BfArM, Swissmedic, MHRA, TGA DRAC, Canada DHPR, Canada Recall, ANVISA, PMDA, ANSM, and NMPA English showed no newly announced public setup or access change that should materially affect normal user access this week.
